description: PERFORM WITH TEST AFTER: body executes once before condition is checked.
notes: WITH TEST AFTER means do-while: execute body, then test condition. Body adds 1 to WS-X (0->1), then UNTIL WS-X > 0 is true, loop ends. Engine gap: does not generate a loop — emits inline body once. Result is coincidentally correct for this single-iteration case. For multi-iteration TEST AFTER scenarios, the engine would produce wrong results.
